node.title: Question with Dropdown Options
node.description: Test question field that renders as dropdown when options are provided

node.title: Question with Free-form Input
node.description: Test question field that renders as text input when no options provided

dynamic_field.name: custom_requirement
dynamic_field.title: Any specific requirements?
dynamic_field.description: Describe any custom requirements you have

node.title: Required Question with Empty Options
node.description: Test edge case with empty options string

dynamic_field.name: edge_case_empty
dynamic_field.title: Edge case: empty options
dynamic_field.description: This has options='' which should behave like no options

node.title: Question with Single Option
node.description: Test edge case with only one option

node.title: Question with Special Characters
node.description: Test options with special characters and spaces

node.title: Mixed Field Types
node.description: Test question field alongside other field types to ensure no interference
